test case id: tc-document-013 title: adding document with invalid date format module: aggiungi documento source pages: 1 preconditions: user is on the document process. test data: document name: test document, document description: this is a test document, date: 15/01/2023 test steps: 1. enter the document name "test document". 2. enter the document description "this is a test document". 3. enter an invalid date format "15/01/2023" (should be in yyyy-mm-dd format). 4. tap on the "save" button. expected result: an error message should be displayed indicating that the date format is invalid. the document should not be added to the process.

test case id: tc-login-001 title: successful login with valid credentials module: loginactivity source pages: 3 preconditions: user has valid email and password. test data: email: user@example.com, password: validpassword test steps: 1. enter the email address "user@example.com" in the login screen. 2. enter the password "validpassword". 3. click on the "sign in" button. expected result: the user should be successfully logged in and redirected to the homeactivity.

test case id: tc-login-002 title: failed login with invalid credentials module: loginactivity source pages: 3 preconditions: user has invalid email and password. test data: email: wrongemail@example.com, password: wrongpassword test steps: 1. enter the email address "wrongemail@example.com" in the login screen. 2. enter the password "wrongpassword". 3. click on the "sign in" button. expected result: an error message should be displayed indicating incorrect credentials.
